name: cn-messaging-context
description: Read, summarize, report on, draft, and safely act on Feishu/Lark and DingTalk messages plus DingTalk OA approvals.

interface.shortDescription: Search Chinese team chat context and handle safe DingTalk approvals.
interface.longDescription: Use Feishu/Lark and DingTalk conversations from a separate connector service to sync history, search messages, summarize recent context, generate group-chat reports, draft replies, send user-confirmed messages, and read or approve DingTalk OA items after explicit confirmation.
defaultPrompt: 总结飞书里昨天关于采购平台的讨论
从钉钉项目群找最近三天的预算调整消息
根据群聊上下文起草一条回复，先别发
看看钉钉 OA 有哪些待审批，先不要通过
